headline: Tim Cook says RAM expenses are 'unsustainable' and Apple is going to raise prices
summary: Apple CEO Tim Cook warns of unavoidable price increases. High RAM costs are driving up expenses. Apple aims to mitigate impacts but will pass costs to consumers.

headline: VSCO launches Studio Pro mobile photo editing app and plans $500 per year subscription
summary: VSCO introduces Studio Pro, a new mobile photo editing app. It aims to compete with Adobe, starting on iOS. The app will feature a steep $500 annual subscription.

headline: Epic wants to let you bring your Fortnite skins to other games
summary: Epic Games plans to enable Fortnite skins in other games. This move aims for an interoperable metaverse. Unreal Engine 6 will facilitate this cross-game functionality.

headline: Anthropic got hit by export rules nobody understands
summary: Anthropic's AI models were temporarily shut down by export rules. The Trump administration ordered a block for foreign nationals. This caused Fable 5 and Mythos 5 to go offline globally.

headline: Get an Apple Watch Ultra for Just $300 and It Can Still Arrive by Father's Day for Amazon Prime Members
summary: Score an Apple Watch Ultra for only $300. This renewed unit offers a $450 discount. Amazon Prime members can get it before Father's Day.

headline: LEGO Reveals a Working Pinball Machine You Can Build Yourself
summary: LEGO unveils a new, buildable working pinball machine. Enthusiasts can now construct their own arcade classic. This set promises a fun and interactive building experience.

headline: The Jackery Explorer 240D 80,000mAh Power Bank Drops to a New Price Low, Just $102 at AliExpress
summary: The Jackery Explorer 240D power bank hit a new low price. Get the 80,000mAh unit for just $102. This deal is available through AliExpress.

headline: Get an Ecoflow River 2 256Wh LiFePO4 Portable Power Station for Less Than a Hundred Bucks
summary: Grab an Ecoflow River 2 portable power station cheaply. The 256Wh LiFePO4 unit is under $100. It's pitched as affordable, reliable backup power.

headline: Iran sends tankers loaded with oil past US military blockade
summary: Three Iranian tankers successfully navigated past a US blockade. They were carrying crude oil through the Gulf of Oman. Ship-tracking data confirmed the passage.

headline: PM warns Burnham against immediate leadership challenge if he wins by-election
summary: Keir Starmer cautions Andy Burnham against an immediate leadership challenge. This warning comes ahead of a potential by-election win. Starmer advises focusing on the Manchester mayoral race instead.

headline: BBC announces 550 job cuts as first part of £500m savings plan
summary: The BBC plans 550 job cuts as part of a £500m savings plan. Initial proposals include 200 losses in the news division. This move aims to streamline operations and reduce costs.

headline: Israel launches fresh strikes on Lebanon despite Trump criticism
summary: Israel initiated new strikes on Lebanon. This action occurred despite recent criticism from Donald Trump. Trump urged PM Netanyahu to be more responsible regarding Lebanon.
